headline: Can Microchip's Expanding Portfolio Help Its Stock Deliver in 2026?
summary: MCHP's expanding portfolio and AI-driven products support its 2026 prospects despite inventory and macro headwinds.

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower after reports suggested that the White House is planning more rules for foreign buyers of large quantities of US chips. The drop comes amid a broader decline in growth-oriented tech stocks.
